targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, method, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="otel", status=~"2..", uri=~"/api/.*"}[5m])))

panels.title: ⏱️ Response Time p95 - Success (2xx by endpoint)

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, method, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="otel", status=~"4..", uri=~"/api/.*"}[5m])))

panels.title: ⏱️ Response Time p95 - Client Errors (4xx by endpoint)

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, method, uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="otel", status=~"5..", uri=~"/api/.*"}[5m])))

panels.title: ⏱️ Response Time p95 - Server Errors (5xx by endpoint)
